title: Sheet
description: Slides a panel in from a screen edge for secondary content or forms.

# Sheet

Slides a panel in from a screen edge for secondary content or forms.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/sheet
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="sheet"
  example={0}
  code={`<Sheet.Root>
  <Sheet.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Open sheet</Button>
  </Sheet.Trigger>
  <Sheet.Content side="right">
    <Sheet.Header>
      <Sheet.Title>Edit profile</Sheet.Title>
      <Sheet.Description>Update your details, then save to apply changes.</Sheet.Description>
    </Sheet.Header>
    <Sheet.Footer>
      <Sheet.Close asChild><Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button></Sheet.Close>
      <Button>Save</Button>
    </Sheet.Footer>
  </Sheet.Content>
</Sheet.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Sheet.Root>
  <Sheet.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Open sheet</Button>
  </Sheet.Trigger>
  <Sheet.Content side="right">
    <Sheet.Header>
      <Sheet.Title>Edit profile</Sheet.Title>
      <Sheet.Description>Update your details, then save to apply changes.</Sheet.Description>
    </Sheet.Header>
    <Sheet.Footer>
      <Sheet.Close asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
      </Sheet.Close>
      <Button>Save</Button>
    </Sheet.Footer>
  </Sheet.Content>
</Sheet.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="sheet"
  example={1}
  code={`<Sheet.Root>
  <Sheet.Trigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline">Open left</Button>
  </Sheet.Trigger>
  <Sheet.Content side="left">
    <Sheet.Header>
      <Sheet.Title>Navigation</Sheet.Title>
      <Sheet.Description>A panel anchored to the start edge.</Sheet.Description>
    </Sheet.Header>
  </Sheet.Content>
</Sheet.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Sheet.Root>
  <Sheet.Trigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline">Open left</Button>
  </Sheet.Trigger>
  <Sheet.Content side="left">
    <Sheet.Header>
      <Sheet.Title>Navigation</Sheet.Title>
      <Sheet.Description>A panel anchored to the start edge.</Sheet.Description>
    </Sheet.Header>
  </Sheet.Content>
</Sheet.Root>
```

## Props

| Prop   | Type        | Required | Default | Description                                           |
| ------ | ----------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `side` | `SheetSide` | No       | -       | Edge the panel is anchored to. Defaults to \`right\`. |

## Variants

| Variant | Values                           |
| ------- | -------------------------------- |
| `side`  | `top`, `bottom`, `left`, `right` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/sheet.json`
- Recipe: `sheet`
- Files: `src/components/ui/sheet.tsx`
